# Connected Apps

Connect and manage integrations with your field service management platforms.

## Available Integrations

| Platform | Auth Method | Status |
|----------|-------------|--------|
| FieldCamp | API Token | Active |
| Jobber | OAuth 2.0 | Active |
| HouseCallPro | OAuth 2.0 | Active |
| ServiceTrade | Credentials | Active |

## Managing Connections

Go to **Settings > Connected Apps** to:
- Connect a new FSM platform
- View sync status and last sync time
- Trigger a manual data sync
- Disconnect a platform

## Sync Behavior

When connected, data syncs automatically:
- **Jobs** sync in real-time via webhooks (when available) or periodically
- **Technicians** sync during initial connection and on-demand
- **Assignments** push back to your FSM when dispatched
